Home›Services› White Label
Partner Program

White Label
Cybersecurity

Deliver enterprise-grade cybersecurity services under your own brand. We build, operate, and maintain the security infrastructure while you own the client relationship and grow your revenue.

Your Brand. Our Expertise. Their Protection.

Building a cybersecurity practice requires years of investment in talent, tools, and operational maturity. Our white label program lets you skip the build phase entirely. You present cybersecurity services under your brand, and our team executes every engagement with the same rigor we bring to Fortune 50 environments.

Your clients never know we exist. You set the pricing, manage the relationship, and deliver the results — while we do the technical heavy lifting behind the scenes.

White Label Services Available

  • Managed Detection & Response (MDR) — 24/7 monitoring under your brand
  • Virtual CISO services — your brand, our security leadership
  • Incident response & digital forensics — rapid deployment, your branding
  • Penetration testing & vulnerability assessments — your reports, our expertise
  • Compliance program management (CMMC, NIST, SOC 2, HIPAA)
  • Security awareness training & phishing simulation
  • Dark web monitoring & threat intelligence
  • Executive cybersecurity programs

How the Partnership Works

  • We develop co-branded or fully white-labeled collateral and deliverables
  • You price services for your market and maintain full margin control
  • All client communication goes through your team — we stay invisible
  • Dedicated partner liaison for seamless coordination
  • Flexible engagement models: per-project, retainer, or managed service
  • SOC reports and deliverables customized with your branding

Ideal White Label Partners

  • MSPs looking to add cybersecurity without building an internal SOC
  • IT consulting firms wanting to expand service offerings
  • Compliance consulting firms needing technical execution capability
  • Law firms that want to offer forensic services to their clients
  • Insurance companies wanting to offer risk mitigation services to policyholders

White Label Benefits

  • Full Brand Control
  • Margin Ownership
  • No Hiring Required
  • Instant Capabilities
  • 24/7 SOC Access
  • Flexible Models

Get Started

Schedule a confidential partner consultation to explore white label opportunities.
